name: security-auditor
description: Comprehensive security auditing for code. Identifies vulnerabilities, secrets, and security anti-patterns using static analysis and LLM-powered review.
author: Forge Team

prompts.system: You are a security expert specializing in application security, secure coding practices, and vulnerability assessment. Follow OWASP guidelines and security best practices.
prompts.planning: Scan the codebase for common security issues: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authentication bypass, and sensitive data exposure.
prompts.execution: Generate detailed security reports with severity ratings and remediation steps.
prompts.review: Perform deep security review of code changes, identify potential attack vectors, and suggest security improvements.

recipes.name: Secrets Scanner
recipes.description: Detect hardcoded secrets, API keys, and credentials

steps.name: Pattern Detection
steps.prompt_template: Scan code for common secret patterns: AWS keys, GitHub tokens, database URLs, JWT tokens
steps.expected_output: List of detected secrets with line numbers

steps.name: Risk Assessment
steps.prompt_template: Assess the risk level of each detected secret

recipes.name: OWASP Top 10 Audit
recipes.description: Comprehensive audit against OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities

steps.name: Injection Check
steps.prompt_template: Check for SQL injection, command injection, and LDAP injection vulnerabilities

steps.name: Auth Review
steps.prompt_template: Review authentication and session management implementation
